title: Graham Hancock finds a SUPRISE at the top of the GREAT PYRAMID
summary: Graham Hancock shares a personal anecdote about discovering his grandfather Philip Hancock's name carved at the top of the Great Pyramid, dated April 5, 1916, which he later confirmed through his grandfather's diaries.

events.description: Philip Hancock (Graham Hancock's grandfather) climbed the Great Pyramid and carved his name at the top on April 5th

key_claims.claim: Graham Hancock has climbed the Great Pyramid five times, two of which were legal climbs
Graham Hancock found the inscription 'P Hancock fifth of April 1916' on the South Side one step down from the top of the Great Pyramid
Graham Hancock's grandfather Philip Hancock was in Egypt during World War I and his diary entry confirmed he climbed the Great Pyramid on that date
